title: OHP ASSISTANCE NAVIGATION PROGRAM - 211info
text: ILLINOIS VALLEY FAMILY COALITION OHP ASSISTANCE NAVIGATION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers screening for OHP assistance programs that can provide assistance with rent and utility assistance, nutrition support, and climate related supports. 535 E River Street Cave Junction, OR 97523 Eligibility: Age 65 or older, children age 0-5, pregnant or gave birth in the past 12 months, OR anyone with a qualifying health condition who are OHP recepients Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (541) 592-8139 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (541) 592-8139 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Cities of Cave Junction, Kerby, O'Brien and Selma Services: Navigator Programs * Medicaid Recipients Other Services Offered At This Location: EMPLOYMENT - RESUME AND JOB SEARCH ASSISTANCE INFORMATION SERVICES - COMPUTER LAB INFORMATION SERVICES - INFORMATION AND REFERRAL MATERIAL GOODS - BASIC NEEDS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ILLINOIS VALLEY FAMILY COALITION
